scripts.publish:sdk: pnpm --filter @sly_ai/sdk build && cd packages/sdk && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:cli: pnpm --filter @sly_ai/cli build && cd packages/cli && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:mcp: pnpm --filter @sly_ai/mcp-server build && cd packages/mcp-server && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:all: pnpm publish:sdk && pnpm publish:cli && pnpm publish:mcp
